emails.subject: Re: Financial Trading in Brazil
emails.body: Hi, Sami! Sorry we missed the call yesterday. I just wanted to update you on some of the financial trading issues in Brazil (and I have added you to the working group list). I am going to finalize our "swap matrix" for Brazil. On the physical trading side, I had asked a physical trading lawyer to call you and am wondering if Elizabeth Sager ever called or emailed. Please let me know. Thanks. Sara Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 05/04/2000 02:55 PM "MBTOS Marcelo Rodrigues" <Mbtos@tozzini.com.br> on 05/04/2000 01:21:59 PM

emails.subject: Re: Financial Trading in Brazil
emails.body: Sara; Are you also involved in EnronOnLine I only got a copy of an EOL summary but would like to receive a more detailed memo about such business. Can you provide me with any additional materials Thanks, Sami Sara Shackleton@ECT 05/04/2000 04:29 PM

emails.subject: Re: Financial Trading in Brazil
emails.body: Sara; I think I am getting old Did you ever forward to me an updated copy of the "swap matrix" for Brazil Would you mind re-sending it to me Hope all is well Thanks and Regards, Sami Sara Shackleton@ECT 05/04/2000 04:29 PM
